creator: thomas@bsdunix.ch
text:
Created attachment 222911
Cyberchef_v9_27_6 diff

fixes/changes:
Added further deconstruction of IPv6 Multicast Addresses in the 'Parse IPv6 Address'
AES Additional data can now be entered in a range of formats
Added numeric validation for arguments in Binary and Hex operattions.
Extractable file formats are now listed properly in the 'Extract Files
Fixed 'JSON to CSV' data flattening.
Fixed 'JSON to CSV' handling of complex structures
Fixed 'Save recipe' URL generation issue.
